required_contains.text: Official docs still explain the displaced participant in pruning-score terms, using pruning score as
shorthand for emissions-based replacement order. In the current runtime, that replacement path is
applied by comparing live emissions, immunity status, and registration-block order on ties rather
than by reading a maintained pruning-score table

forbidden_contains.text: Pruning score ranks which UID is most expendable when a full subnet accepts a new registration.
Deregistration is the removal that frees the selected slot
- **Pruning score** — ranking input for displacement candidates.
